name: wilson-chat-only
description: Deny the AskUserQuestion tool at the PreToolUse layer — the boxed terminal option-picker UI is forbidden, options must be presented inline as plain text and the agent waits for the user's plain-text reply (chat-only interaction mode). The deny reason is an AI-native single-line directive (CHAT_ONLY_MODE { rule, action, scope, optout }) so the model parses it and adapts the same turn, rather than retrying the tool. Solves the case where rigid options+rationale picker output reads as a wizard wall rather than a conversation. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_CHAT_ONLY=1 (or WILSON_NO_CHAT_ONLY=1).
